steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage establishes that “everything from monumental sculptures to street art” directly enables the city to “satisfy any art lover.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: “Breadth of” directly explains why the city satisfies any art lover—a wide variety of styles appeals to diverse tastes. The other options are all negative and don't fit the logic. That matches choice B — B is correct.
